intent: PRIMARY: display name input field; role=textbox; text="Display name"
generated_code:
async def run_test():
    async with testmu.step('Typing the display name into the sign up form'):
        element_0 = page.locator("internal:role=textbox[name=\"Display name\"i]")
        await capture_visual_context(element_0)
        await element_0.click()
        await element_0.fill("Kane Tester")
rationale: The Sign up tab and form are already open; start filling required fields by entering the provided display name in the Display name textbox.

async def run_test():
    async with testmu.step('Typing a unique email into the Email field'):

action_instruction: Clicking the Sign up button to submit the form
intent: PRIMARY: Submit sign up form button; role=button; text="Sign up" | HINTS: large green button below Password field
generated_code:
async def run_test():
    try:
        _loc_1 = page.locator("internal:role=button[name=\"Sign up\"i]")
        await capture_visual_context(_loc_1)
        await _loc_1.click()
    except Exception:
        await page.mouse.click(960, 696)
        set_visual_context(960, 696)
rationale: All three fields (display name, email, password) are filled. Submitting the form is the remaining step to complete sign up.

intent: PRIMARY: wait for the Home page to be visible (confirm sign-up succeeded)

action_params.until_condition: the heading "Home" is visible near the top of the page

until_condition: the heading "Home" is visible near the top of the page
generated_code:
async def run_test():
    _condition_met = False
    _until_retries = 0
    while _until_retries < 10:
        print(f"[until-loop] iteration {_until_retries + 1}/10")
        async with testmu.step('Wait 800ms until condition'):
            await page.wait_for_timeout(800)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        if await testmu.check_until_condition(page, 'the heading "Home" is visible near the top of the page'):
            _condition_met = True
            break
        _until_retries += 1
    set_var("__result__", {"condition_met": _condition_met, "retries": _until_retries + 1})
